# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] UI improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Data/content update

## Pages or Areas Affected

List routes, components, data files, or docs affected.

## Checks

- [ ] I reviewed `git status --short`.
- [ ] I only included intended files.
- [ ] I reused existing components where possible.
- [ ] I kept the work mobile-first.
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`.

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots for visual changes.

## Notes

Add deployment notes, follow-up tasks, or known limitations.
